transcript.text: This faceless horror channel generated $6,000 from videos they started posting 2 months ago. What they did is very simple. They make compilations of horror movies and scenes with a simple whiteboard format. Animations like this cost only 60 to 100 bucks to make, but this what sets them apart and helps them climb the faceless YouTube pyramid. Because YouTube is a game of saturation, the more competition you have, the less views you're going to get. So, those guys kneeled down and chose a branded format all to avoid competition. By the way, this is only one of 15 core strategies to win on YouTube that I'm going to reveal during a 3-day faceless event in July. So, if you want to know the rest, get all of those bonuses from the list. Just comment foundry and I'll get you the link.
